capture_note: Captured 2026-07-08 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real mistralai/Ministral-3-14B-Instruct-2512 TP=1 SGLang production-path execution in temporary container sglang-ministral3-14b on one B300 GPU. Used a model-local HF cache after snapshot download, cookbook-aligned --trust-remote-code, disabled CUDA graph prefill/decode, enabled SGLANG_DIFFUSION_ENABLE_W8A8_FP8_GEMM=1 to expose the FP8 W8A8 GEMM path selected by the original evidence, delayed torch-op wrapping until after imports, preserved server startup/warmup records for static_quant_fp8 and sgl_kernel fp8_scaled_mm shapes, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency.
